title: How One Voluntary "No" a Week Trains a Godly Man to Run His Whole Life
caption:
How one voluntary "no" a week trains a godly man to run his whole life.

Pick one appetite this week. Not to punish it, to prove it doesn't run you. Skip the dessert you'd normally have. Skip the show you'd normally binge. Small, specific, on purpose, and you tell no one.

1 Corinthians 9:27: Paul disciplined his body and kept it under control, so that after preaching to others he himself wouldn't be disqualified. He wasn't waiting for a crisis to practice self-control. He built it in the small moments no one was grading.

The muscle that skips dessert on a Tuesday is the same one that walks away from the scroll at 1 a.m. You don't build it in the emergency. You build it in the boring rep nobody sees.

Train the no you don't need yet. You'll need it eventually.

#faith #selfcontrol #christianmen #manofgod #discipline #1corinthians #fasting
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
